name: Jam Kolaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and cream cheese in an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring well.
3. Roll dough into a sheet about 1/8-inch thick on a lightly floured surface.
4. Cut rounds using a 2-1/2-inch cookie cutter and place them on greased cookie sheets.
5. Spoon 1/4 teaspoon of jam onto each cookie and fold the opposite sides to center, slightly overlapping the edges.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
7. Cool on wire racks and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
Yield: about 3-1/2 dozen.
